name: Apple Crunch Coffee Cake
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Apples (about 2), thinly pared and thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees F.
2. Grease a square pan with the melted butter.
3. In a large bowl, mix the Bisquick baking mix, milk (or water), sugar, and egg until well combined.
4. Spread half of the batter in the prepared pan.
5. Arrange apple slices on top of the batter.
6. Sprinkle with half of the streusel topping.
7. Spread remaining batter over the apples.
8. Sprinkle with the remaining streusel topping and nuts, if using.
9. Bake for about 25 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
10. Allow to cool completely before serving.
11. For the glaze, mix powdered sugar and milk until smooth and of desired consistency. Drizzle over the cooled cake.
This recipe makes 8 servings.
